bull.b: Analysts raised near-term EBITDA expectations after observed operational improvements, signaling increased confidence in the company's earnings trajectory.
Better-than-expected gross margin leverage supported stronger adjusted EBITDA performance, indicating that revenue improvements could translate into outsized profit growth.
Improved operating expense management drove a sequential decline in adjusted operating costs, demonstrating the company's ability to preserve profitability even with flat revenues.

bear.b: Sales weakness has broadened across major customer segments, undermining top-line momentum and putting pressure on future revenue targets.
Uncertainty around future data licensing monetization, amid growing generative AI competition, raises questions about the sustainability of an important revenue stream.
Ongoing merger delays are straining the company's liquidity position and heightening financing risk until strategic clarity or transaction progress occurs.
